content:
1 min read
Just now

--

Press enter or click to view image in full size

Armies of software engineers used to write code, much of it redundant, inefficient, or low-quality. Let’s be honest, many of us felt that we didn’t do anything useful. The salary is good, but I consider that a separate issue.
That time is gone.(I’m not going to argue why, if you are being honest to yourself you can feel it in your bones) The new role of software engineers is to work alongside AI systems, guiding them with prompts and reviewing their output.
Is this bad? Only if we, as a society, make it so. An ideal future would look like this: people would start working on problems that truly matter — perhaps going beyond the Standard Model of physics, building quantum computers, or making advances in biology and other fields.
I can foresee a future where we seek more powerful AI and more efficient ways to use it.
We have to be together in this challenge such that we all survive to see the new world.
